view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for `dry_run` support on mutating actions is satisfied as evidenced by the exploratory step.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for `dry_run` support on mutating actions is satisfied as evidenced by the exploratory step.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step confirms that the system supports a `dry_run` mode for mutating actions, as demonstrated in the linked use case where an agent can preview the consequences of rescheduling appointments without committing changes. The evidence shows that the dry-run provides structured responses detailing which bookings would move cleanly, which would conflict, and what requires approval, thus fulfilling the requirement for validation against live schedules and policies. This aligns with the expected result of capturing either confirmation of requirement coverage or a precise gap, which in this case, is confirmed.
